def smallest_change(arr):
    """To make an integer array palindromic, find the minimum number of element changes required. A palindromic array is identical when reversed. Changing an element means setting it to any integer of choice.

    With examples:
    smallest_change([1,2,3,5,4,7,9,6]) == 4
    smallest_change([1, 2, 3, 4, 3, 2, 2]) == 1
    smallest_change([1, 2, 3, 2, 1]) == 0
    """
